title: realistic resource pack
description: A realistic Minecraft resource pack that improves texture detail and realism while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.
body:
Realistic Resource Pack enhances Minecraft’s visuals with a more natural and detailed look while staying true to the original style of the game. Textures are refined to feel more lifelike, with improved depth, cleaner materials, and better consistency across blocks and items.

This pack is designed to work well in survival and creative gameplay without changing how the game feels. Whether you’re building, exploring, or just enjoying the scenery, it aims to make the world look more immersive without being distracting or overcomplicated.

Features:

High-quality, realistic textures

Improved detail and material definition

Consistent style across blocks and items

Works with most shaders for even better visuals
